rationale: ReadPreference=SECONDARY not applied to getCollectionNames(); spec requires read preference be honored for all operations.
Internal buffer not resized in setChunkSize(); implementation bug with no specific GridFS spec rule contradicted.
GridFS spec requires chunks index on files_id+n; driver fails to create it, causing NPE on validate().
skip() throws exception when _currentChunkIdx=-1; internal logic bug, no specific spec rule violated.
findAndModify applied to $cmd collection doesn't use ObjectClass; internal implementation detail, not a spec rule.
JSON.parse() fails to parse $date with unquoted Long; BSON extended JSON spec requires this format be handled.
API ergonomics improvement to make GridFSFile constructor protected; no spec behavior involved.
Request for unique version string per release; API ergonomics, no spec involvement.
Driver double-authenticates on same connection due to code path calling authenticate twice; implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
Javadoc improvement to declare MongoException in @throws; documentation only, no spec behavior.
API ergonomics improvement to add sort parameter to findOne(); no spec rule contradicted.
Change default timeout values in MongoOptions; configuration tuning, no spec behavior.
Make exception subclass constructors public; Java API accessibility change, no spec involvement.
count/distinct commands ignore ReadPreference; spec requires read preference be honored for all reads including commands.
Concurrent authenticate calls cause nonce collision; thread-safety implementation bug, no specific auth spec rule violated.
SocketTimeoutException on idle Azure connections; network/environment connectivity issue, no spec behavior.
Driver checks 'err' field for command errors but spec requires checking ok=0 and either 'err' or 'errmsg'.
DB.java passes null readPrefs to command(); spec requires read preference be applied to command routing.
MapReduce fails when output is a string collection name; regression in obeyReadPreference code, internal casting bug.
StackOverflow on cyclic DBRef during _checkKeys; internal implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Driver silently connects hosts from multiple replica sets; SDAM spec requires hosts in different sets be rejected or isolated.
User misunderstanding MongoDB partial-subdocument query semantics; not a driver bug or spec deviation.
NPE in WriteResult.getN() when 'n' field absent; internal null-handling bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
DBRef missing hashCode() while defining equals(); Java API contract bug, no spec involvement.
OutMessage not released on exception in DBTCPConnector#call; resource management bug, no spec behavior.
Performance improvement to make DBCursor finalizer optional; GC tuning, no spec behavior involved.
Android platform support blocked by java.lang.management dependency; platform compatibility, no spec behavior.
Reduce verbose stack traces on replica set member failure; logging/UX improvement, no spec behavior.
Semaphore over-released in SimplePool causing Error on Java 7; concurrency implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Failover causes 'not talking to master' errors; thin description, unclear if specific SDAM spec rule contradicted.
count/commands don't honor slaveOk/secondary read preference; spec requires read preference apply to all read operations.
TaggedReadPreference for PRIMARY tag incorrectly fails; server-selection spec requires primary tag to select primary server.
collection.remove() can return null instead of WriteResult; internal code path bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Add QueryBuilder.and() operator; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Null write concern causes NPE that empties connection pool; input validation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Make BSONTimestamp implement Comparable; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
getnonce and authenticate commands sent to different servers when slaveOk; auth spec requires both on same connection/server.
Race condition in requestEnsureConnection causes NPE; concurrency implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
readPreference=nearest intermittently fails; thin description, unclear if specific server-selection spec rule contradicted.
JSONParser throws on ISODate() constructor syntax; this is MongoDB shell syntax, not standard BSON extended JSON spec.
Improve error message to include class/field name on illegal field; diagnostics improvement, no spec behavior.
Symbol class missing equals/hashCode; Java API contract bug, no BSON spec rule about Java object equality.
BSONTimestamp API uses seconds but BSON type is in milliseconds; BSON spec precision requirement violated causing data loss.
Infrequent CursorNotFound exceptions in production; thin description, unclear if specific cursor spec rule contradicted.
InterruptedException swallowed in permitAcquired(); Java concurrency best practice bug, no spec behavior.
isCapped() ClassCastException after MongoDB 2.2 changed 'capped' field type; server compatibility bug, no spec rule.
Add $not and $elemMatch to QueryBuilder; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Avoid List-to-Array conversion in insert for performance; internal optimization, no spec behavior involved.
Driver uses EC2 internal IP from isMaster response instead of configured external IP; SDAM address handling, unclear spec rule.
Mongo constructor hangs in infinite loop when replica set unavailable; startup behavior regression, no specific SDAM rule about startup blocking.
